violations.text: The handle on the one door refrigerator located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The condensate from the 1 door freezer refrigeration was observed with a build up of ice. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Bathroom door that open to areas of food prep must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
